title: Cutting of Existing Couplers and Welding of Riser Pipe with new Male and Female Couplers for Strategic water Storage / Recovery project in LIWA
content:
Project Name: Cutting of Existing Couplers and Welding of Riser Pipe with new Male and Female Couplers for Strategic water Storage / Recovery project in LIWA.
Client: ACC POSCO JV.
Project code: 4019023.
Description: Cutting of Existing Couplers and Welding of Riser Pipe with new Male and Female Couplers, NDT, Pickling and Passivation & Hydrotest (Grade – SS316L, 26600 Inch Dia).
Location: Abu Dhabi.
Field of activity: Manufacturing Works.
Market sector: Water Treatment.
Status: Completed 2020.
Duration: OCT 2019 – MAR 2020.
MO 304, Jebel Ali free Zone, Dubai, UAE
